chunks.title: Video_11
chunks.text: Now in notion basically there are blocks in blocks if you press slash you get to choose from a variety of options. What are those options? You can select a bulleted list, you can select a to do list, you can select a separate page, an article that you can attach there. Basically you can create chunks of work and you can compile it down there. That is a fun part of it. So yeah it's very interesting and it really really increases your productivity minimum by 10x times. Thank you.
